name: Sarasa
description: The protagonist of this series. She takes the name of her murdered twin bother Tatara, who was known as the child of fate. As Tatara, she wields the sword of Byakko and leads the survivors of Byakko Village. Even among her allies few people know she is a girl. Sarasa hopes to create a land that is fertile, full of flora, and free of strife. Though she is quick to cry and psychologically weak in some respects, over the course of the story she develops undeniable skills in leadership and swordplay

name: Akihiko Nirei
description: **Height:** 163 cm A first-year student at Furin High School in Class 1. Nirei is weak at fighting, but his frank personality livens up the room — he's the life of the class. He wants to protect the town more than anybody else and thus has always aspired to become a student at Furin High School. Nirei always carries a notepad and pen in his chest pocket. He's a well-informed person whose hobby is collecting and analyzing data on people he thinks are cool. (Source: WIND BREAKER Official Website)

description: __Affiliation:__ Cleaners __Height:__ 193 cm Griss is one of the Cleaners who work as a supporter type due to lacking a jinki of his own. Griss has incredible strength. His grip especially stands out, with a simple handshake causing Rudo pain. With just one hand he is able to crush the armour of an Aberrant Beast, which is known to be tough. He is also able to throw said beasts incredible distances.

name: Mei Karuma
